subcodes.first_line: O thou who turnest towards God! His Holiness Job endured illnesses, ailments and mighty tribulations until in the fountain of healing [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای مقبل الی الله حضرت ایوب تحمل امراض و علل و مشقت عظمی نمود تا در چشمه شفا
subcodes.subjects: @health and healing; material and spiritual healing, @stories; anecdotes, @spiritual transformation
